name: 7pc Starter Kitchen Textile Set Dark Blue - Room Essentials™: Dish Towels, Hot Pads & Oven Mitts, Pot Holders, Kitchen Towels
description:
Give your kitchen a total textile refresh with this 7-Piece Starter Kitchen Textile Set from Room Essentials™. This kitchen set includes two dish cloths, two kitchen towels, two pot holders and an oven mitt to meet your cooking and cleaning needs. Made of cotton and polyester, these dark blue kitchen textiles are must-haves for your kitchen and are machine washable for easy cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
